qa_process.notes: Single QA person handles all testing manually. No automated tests. Developers do some ad-hoc testing. Critical bugs regularly ship to players. No device farm — only tested on 2 machines.

localization.notes: Freelance translators work from shared Google Sheets. No context screenshots for translators. Quality inconsistent — community reports frequent localization bugs. No LQA process.

asset_creation.notes: Artists create all assets from scratch. No asset library. No procedural workflows. High revision count due to lack of style guide enforcement. Texture creation is the biggest bottleneck — takes ~60% of art time.

deployment.notes: Lead developer manually builds and uploads to Steam. No CI/CD pipeline. Rollbacks are painful — last one took 6 hours. No staging environment.

player_support.notes: Producer handles player support part-time via Discord and email. No ticketing system. No FAQ automation. Response times are slow and inconsistent.
